title: CreRaces (Do not use yet)
description: The Experimental project for CreRaces: a RPG style of Race selection!
body:
Main page on CurseForge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/creraces

***Please NOTE that this is the page for the FUTURE rework of CreRaces!***

There is nothing here yet but old Experimental files of [CreRaces Classic](https://modrinth.com/mod/creraces) which is the current version you should use!

Join the Discord Server! https://discord.gg/jwAeWYyGug

Made by: **[mc_jojo3](https://modrinth.com/user/mcjojo3 'Profile')**
